# modernGLMM

[![R \>=
4.1.0](https://img.shields.io/badge/R-%3E%3D%204.1.0-276DC3.svg)](https://www.r-project.org/)
[![License:
GPL-3](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-GPL--3-blue.svg)](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.en.html)

`modernGLMM` provides reproducible R implementations of all worked
examples from:

> Stroup, W. W., Ptukhina, M., and Garai, S. (2024). *Generalized Linear
> Mixed Models: Modern Concepts, Methods and Applications* (2nd ed.).
> CRC Press.

The book supplies SAS code for its worked examples. `modernGLMM`
provides equivalent R implementations using `lme4`, `glmmTMB`, `nlme`,
`emmeans`, and `car`, with numerical results independently verified
against the printed text.

## Installation

``` r

if (!requireNamespace("remotes", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("remotes")
}
remotes::install_github("myaseen208/modernGLMM")
```

## Implemented Examples

| Chapter | Topic | Functions |
|----|----|----|
| 1 | Linear and logistic regression review | `Exam1.1`, `Exam1.2` |
| 3 | Treatment structures and factorial designs | `Exam3.2`, `Exam3.3`, `Exam3.5`, `Exam3.9` |
| 8 | Mixed model foundations and splines | `Exam8.1`, `Exam8.2`, `Exam8.3`, `Exam8.7` |
| 9 | Variance component estimation | `Exam9.1`, `Exam9.2`, `Exam9.3`, `Exam9.4` |
| 10 | BLUPs and predictable functions | `Exam10.1`, `Exam10.2`, `Exam10.4` |
| 11 | Count data GLMMs | `Exam11.1`, `Exam11.3` |
| 21 | Power analysis for GLMMs | `Exam21.1` |

Chapters 12–18 depend on the SAS Data and Program Library that
accompanies the book. These chapters are included as documented
functions and datasets; full numerical verification awaits access to
those data (see `inst/verification/datasets-not-yet-available.md`).

## Verification

Numerical results have been independently verified against the 2nd
edition.

| Status | Count | Description |
|----|---:|----|
| EXACT | 477 | Matches book value within tolerance ( |
| APPROX | 10 | Matches within wider tolerance ( |
| MISMATCH_IRREDUCIBLE | 14 | Documented irreducible discrepancy (SAS/R estimation differences) |
| UNVERIF_CONFIRMED_ABSENT | 30 | No printed target in 2nd edition or dataset not yet available |
| **Pass rate** | **97.2%** | 487 / 501 verifiable quantities |

Full results: `inst/verification/verification-results.csv`

Documented irreducible mismatches arise from:

- SAS GLIMMIX estimable-function construction (Exam8.7, Exam10.4)
- Kenward–Roger denominator df at variance-component boundary (Exam9.4)
- SAS NOBOUND allowing negative variance components; R enforces VC ≥ 0
  (Exam9.4)
- Exam11.3 dataset reconstructed from published sample means; SAS uses
  PL, R uses ML

## Quick Start

``` r

library(modernGLMM)

# Chapter 11: Poisson GLMM for count data
Exam11.1()

# Chapter 9: Variance component estimation (REML)
Exam9.1()

# Chapter 21: Power analysis for a GLMM
Exam21.1()
```

## Requesting the SAS Data and Program Library

Chapters 12–18 use datasets from the SAS Data and Program Library
accompanying the book. To request access, contact:

- **Author:** Walter W. Stroup — <wstroup1@unl.edu>
- **Publisher:** <mpkbookspermissions@tandf.co.uk>

## Citation

``` r

citation("modernGLMM")
```

Yaseen, M., Munawar, A., Stroup, W. W., Ptukhina, M., and Garai, S.
(2026). *modernGLMM: R Implementation of Examples from Stroup, Ptukhina
and Garai (2024) Generalized Linear Mixed Models* (Version 0.1.0).
GitHub. <https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM>

# Package index

## Package Overview

- [`modernGLMM`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/modernGLMM-package.md)
  [`modernGLMM-package`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/modernGLMM-package.md)
  : modernGLMM: Unified R Workflows for Generalized Linear Mixed Models

## Core Data and Examples

Datasets and executable examples from the 2024 GLMM text.

- [`Table1.1`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/Table1.1.md)
  : Data for Table1.1 from Generalized Linear Mixed Models: Modern
  Concepts, Methods and Applications by Stroup, Ptukhina, and Garai
  (2024, 2nd ed.)
- [`Table1.2`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/Table1.2.md)
  : Data for Table1.2 from Generalized Linear Mixed Models: Modern
  Concepts, Methods and Applications by Stroup, Ptukhina, and Garai
  (2024, 2nd ed.)
- [`DataExam2.B.2`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/DataExam2.B.2.md)
  : Data for Example 2.B.2 from Generalized Linear Mixed Models: Modern
  Concepts, Methods and Applications by Stroup, Ptukhina, and Garai
  (2024, 2nd ed.)
- [`DataExam2.B.3`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/DataExam2.B.3.md)
  : Data for Example 2.B.3 from Generalized Linear Mixed Models: Modern
  Concepts, Methods and Applications by Stroup, Ptukhina, and Garai
  (2024, 2nd ed.)
- [`DataExam2.B.4`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/DataExam2.B.4.md)
  : Data for Example 2.B.4 from Generalized Linear Mixed Models: Modern
  Concepts, Methods and Applications by Stroup, Ptukhina, and Garai
  (2024, 2nd ed.)
- [`DataExam2.B.7`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/DataExam2.B.7.md)
  : Data for Example 2.B.7 from Generalized Linear Mixed Models: Modern
  Concepts, Methods and Applications by Stroup, Ptukhina, and Garai
  (2024, 2nd ed.)
- [`DataSet10.1`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/DataSet10.1.md)
  : Data for Example 10.1 from Generalized Linear Mixed Models: Modern
  Concepts, Methods and Applications by Stroup, Ptukhina, and Garai
  (2024, 2nd ed.)
- [`DataSet10.2`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/DataSet10.2.md)
  : Data for Example 10.2 from Generalized Linear Mixed Models: Modern
  Concepts, Methods and Applications by Stroup, Ptukhina, and Garai
  (2024, 2nd ed.)
- [`DataSet10.4`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/DataSet10.4.md)
  : Data for Example 10.4 from Generalized Linear Mixed Models: Modern
  Concepts, Methods and Applications by Stroup, Ptukhina, and Garai
  (2024, 2nd ed.)
- [`DataSet11.1`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/DataSet11.1.md)
  : Data Set 11.1 - Completely Randomized Count Data
- [`DataSet11.3`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/DataSet11.3.md)
  : Data Set 11.3 - Randomized Complete Block Count Data
- [`DataSet11.4`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/DataSet11.4.md)
  : Data Set 11.4 - Split-Plot Count Data
- [`DataSet12.1`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/DataSet12.1.md)
  : Data for Example 12.1 — Continuous Proportion Dose-Response (Chapter
  12)
- [`DataSet12.2`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/DataSet12.2.md)
  : Data for Example 12.2 — Binomial Nested Factorial (Chapter 12)
- [`DataSet14.1`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/DataSet14.1.md)
  : Data for Example 14.1 — Ordinal Proportional Odds GLMM (Chapter 14)
- [`DataSet14.2`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/DataSet14.2.md)
  : Data for Example 14.2 — Non-Proportional Odds: Poinsettia Trial
  (Chapter 14)
- [`DataSet17.1`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/DataSet17.1.md)
  : Data for Example 17.1 — Crossover with ARH(1) Covariance (Chapter
  17)
- [`DataSet17.2`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/DataSet17.2.md)
  : Data for Example 17.2 — Sparse Longitudinal Data with SP(POW)
  (Chapter 17)
- [`DataSet18.1`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/DataSet18.1.md)
  : Data for Example 18.1 — Alliance Wheat Trial: Gaussian Spatial
  (Chapter 18)
- [`DataSet18.2`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/DataSet18.2.md)
  : Data for Example 18.2 — Hessian Fly Trial: Binomial Spatial (Chapter
  18)
- [`DataSet21.1`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/DataSet21.1.md)
  : Data for Example 21.1 — Power Curve for One-Way ANOVA (Chapter 21)
- [`DataSet3.1`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/DataSet3.1.md)
  : Data for Example 3.1 and Example 3.2 from Generalized Linear Mixed
  Models: Modern Concepts, Methods and Applications by Stroup, Ptukhina,
  and Garai (2024, 2nd ed.)
- [`DataSet3.2`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/DataSet3.2.md)
  : DataSet3.2 for Example 3.3, Example 3.4, Example3.6, Example3.8 and
  Example 3.9 from Generalized Linear Mixed Models: Modern Concepts,
  Methods and Applications by Stroup, Ptukhina, and Garai (2024, 2nd
  ed.)
- [`DataSet3.3`](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/reference/DataSet3.3.md)
  : Data for Example3.7 from Generalized Linear Mixed Models: Modern

  (2024, 2nd ed.)

  : Example 9.4 from Generalized Linear Mixed Models: Modern Concepts,
  Methods and Applications by Stroup, Ptukhina, and Garai (2024, 2nd
  ed.)

# Articles

### Chapter Vignettes

- [Chapter 1: Modeling
  Basics](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/articles/chapter-01-introduction.md):
- [Chapter 2: Design
  Matters](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/articles/chapter-02-inference-basics.md):
- [Chapter 3: Setting the
  Stage](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/articles/chapter-03-gaussian-glm.md):
- [Chapter 4: Pre-GLMM Estimation and Inference
  Basics](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/articles/chapter-04-random-effects.md):
- [Chapter 5: GLMM
  Estimation](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/articles/chapter-05-mixed-model-anova.md):
- [Chapter 6: Inference, Part
  I](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/articles/chapter-06-glmm-overview.md):
- [Chapter 7: Inference, Part
  II](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/articles/chapter-07-inference-part-2.md):
- [Chapter 8: Treatment and Explanatory Variable
  Structure](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/articles/chapter-08-treatment-structures.md):
- [Chapter 9: Multi-Level
  Models](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/articles/chapter-09-multi-level-models.md):
- [Chapter 10: Best Linear Unbiased
  Prediction](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/articles/chapter-10-blup.md):
- [Chapter 11:
  Counts](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/articles/chapter-11-count-data.md):
- [Chapter 12: Rates and
  Proportions](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/articles/chapter-12-rates-proportions.md):
- [Chapter 13: Zero-Inflated and Hurdle
  Models](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/articles/chapter-13-zero-inflated.md):
- [Chapter 14: Multinomial
  Data](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/articles/chapter-14-multinomial-data.md):
- [Chapter 15: Time-to-Event
  Data](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/articles/chapter-15-time-to-event.md):
- [Chapter 16: Smoothing Splines and Additive
  Models](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/articles/chapter-16-smoothing-splines.md):
- [Chapter 17: Correlated Errors, Part I: Repeated
  Measures](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/articles/chapter-17-repeated-measures.md):
- [Chapter 18: Correlated Errors, Part II: Spatial
  Variability](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/articles/chapter-18-correlated-errors.md):
- [Chapter 19: Bayesian Implementation of
  GLMM](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/articles/chapter-19-bayesian-glmm.md):
- [Chapter 20: Five Bayesian GLMM
  Examples](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/articles/chapter-20-bayesian-examples.md):
- [Chapter 21: Precision, Power, Sample Size, and
  Planning](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/articles/chapter-21-power-sample-size.md):

### Verification

- [Verification and
  Reproducibility](https://github.com/myaseen208/modernGLMM/articles/verification-summary.md):
